summary: 20 test cases designed (12 unit, 5 API integration, 3 E2E-deferred) covering OUT-1..OUT-6, regressions B1/B2/B3/B4, security S2/S4, and a11y on EmptyOnboarding. E2E cases T18/T19/T20 deferred to task #19 (deploy-and-verify) where real vercel dev + Playwright are available. All 17 non-deferred cases are immediately executable against existing vitest suites.
